'''zhanafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oikophobia|oikophobia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oikophobia|oikophobia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhanafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhænæfæth|zhænæfæth]] || [[word:zhænæfæj|zhænæfæj]] || [[word:zhænæfæsh|zhænæfæsh]] || [[word:zhænæfæ|zhænæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhananafath|zhananafath]] || [[word:zhananafaj|zhananafaj]] || [[word:zhananafash|zhananafash]] || [[word:zhananafa|zhananafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhanafath|zhanafath]] || [[word:zhanafaj|zhanafaj]] || [[word:zhanafash|zhanafash]] || [[word:zhanafa|zhanafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhanaffath|zhanaffath]] || [[word:zhanaffaj|zhanaffaj]] || [[word:zhanaffash|zhanaffash]] || [[word:zhanaffaf|zhanaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhanafatha|zhanafatha]] || [[word:zhanafaja|zhanafaja]] || [[word:zhanafasha|zhanafasha]] || [[word:zhanafaka|zhanafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhanafath|zhanafath]] || [[word:zhanafaj|zhanafaj]] || [[word:zhanafash|zhanafash]] || [[word:zhanafa|zhanafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhanafathal|zhanafathal]] || [[word:zhanafajal|zhanafajal]] || [[word:zhanafashal|zhanafashal]] || [[word:zhanafakal|zhanafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhanafathatha|zhanafathatha]] || [[word:zhanafajaja|zhanafajaja]] || [[word:zhanafashasha|zhanafashasha]] || [[word:zhanafaka|zhanafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhanafathan|zhanafathan]] || [[word:zhanafajan|zhanafajan]] || [[word:zhanafashan|zhanafashan]] || [[word:zhanafakan|zhanafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhanafathaoro|zhanafathaoro]] || [[word:zhanafajaoro|zhanafajaoro]] || [[word:zhanafashaoro|zhanafashaoro]] || [[word:zhanafakaoro|zhanafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
